title: Star Crossed
description: The template modpack for all Starlight Studios projects. Feel free to use for great optimization and quality of life features!
body:
Welcome to Starlight Studios' Star Crossed! This pack is a template used by Starlight Studios for most of our projects. Feel free to use it for great optimization and beautiful visuals while playing Vanilla.

Features:

  • Many performance mods to achieve best performance possible.
  • Oculus included so you can play with shaders! Both Euphoria Patches and Supplemental Patches are included if you wish to use Complementary!
  • Distant Horizons.
  • Backported Features so you can mod on 1.20.1 as if it were 1.21.9!
  • Many Quality of Life mods already included so you don't have to waste time installing them!
